fields.consent: I consent to my information being stored for recruitment purposes

public.indexLead: Create an account to share your contact details and CV.

verify.pendingBody: We've sent you an email. Click the link in that email to activate your account.
verify.successBody: Your email is verified. You can log in now.
verify.expired: The verification link is invalid or has expired.

forgot.title: Forgot password
forgot.instructions: Enter your email address and we'll send you a reset link.
forgot.sent: If that email is registered, we've sent a reset link.

reset.title: Choose a new password
reset.expired: The reset link is invalid or has expired.
reset.success: Password updated. Log in with your new password.

list.title: Candidates
list.previewNotAvailable: Inline preview is only available for PDF.

candidate.title: Candidate details
candidate.deleteConfirm: Are you sure? This permanently deletes all data.

settings.title: Settings
settings.logoHint: PNG, JPG or SVG, max 2 MB
settings.backupHint: Contains the database and all CV files as a zip.

delete.title: Delete my account
delete.warning: This permanently deletes all your data, including your CV. This cannot be undone.

errors.notVerified: You must verify your email first.
errors.rateLimited: Too many attempts. Try again later.
errors.csrf: Invalid form submission. Reload the page and try again.
errors.emailTaken: That email address is already registered.
errors.serverError: Server error. Please try again later.

field.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 10 characters.
field.passwordTooCommon: Password is too common — choose a stronger one.

verify-email.subject: Verify your email
verify-email.body: Thanks for registering at {siteName}. Click the link below to verify your email address (valid for 24 hours):
verify-email.ignore: If you didn't register, you can ignore this email.

reset-password.subject: Reset your password
reset-password.body: Click the link below to choose a new password (valid for 1 hour):
reset-password.ignore: If you didn't request this, you can ignore this email.

inactivity-warning.subject: Your account will be deleted soon
inactivity-warning.body: Your account at {siteName} has been inactive for 12 months and will be automatically deleted in {days} days. Log in if you want to keep it.

privacy.title: Privacy policy
privacy.intro: This page describes how your personal data is processed in CandidatePortal.
privacy.placeholder: The full privacy policy goes here: which data is collected, purposes, retention, your rights (access, deletion, rectification), contact details for the data controller.
